meta.title: Arce — Surgical Cinema · v24 Il Capo
meta.description: Surgical cinema: twenty-seven years of complex oral & maxillofacial cases, shot in one take. Dr. Jorge Arce, South Bay.

sections.title: Surgical Cinema.
sections.sub: Oral & maxillofacial surgery 2.0 — South Bay, California

sections.big: Twenty-seven years of complex cases, shot in one take — no shortcuts, no retakes, no volume medicine.
cols: Dr. Jorge Arce trained in Colombia and built his life's work in California, devoting his career entirely to oral and maxillofacial surgery and dental implantology. Board certified in implantology.

In 2007 he founded the Dental Implants Center of South Bay — Redondo Beach and Torrance — a referral destination for the difficult extractions, reconstructions, and full-arch cases other surgeons step away from.

sections.title: Every frame, deliberate.
sections.sub: Planning before anyone operates — implants, grafting, sequencing, restoration

rows.ds: From single implants to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction, planned and placed with precision.
Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost.
The difficult extractions and surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.
Long-term care that protects the work of a restored smile.
Identifying and addressing conditions affecting teeth, gums, and bone.
Clarity and direction for patients facing complex decisions.

sections.title: The set, est. 2007.
sections.sub: Dental Implants Center of South Bay — Redondo Beach & Torrance

sections.note: slot de video — reel de la práctica en producción real

cells.l: Founder — Dental Implants Center of South Bay

sections.q: “I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.”
